basic_details.job_title: Delhi State AYUSH Society Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 167 Yoga Instructor, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Delhi State AYUSH Society (DSAS), Directorate of AYUSH, Govt. of NCT of Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Program Manager, Consultant NAM, Medical Officer (Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy), Yoga Instructor, Pharmacist (Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy)
basic_details.department: Directorate of AYUSH, Govt. of NCT of Delhi under National Ayush Mission (NAM)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 167 (Program Manager: 01, Consultant NAM: 02, Medical Officer: 70, Yoga Instructor: 19, Pharmacist: 74 + others against regular sanctioned vacant posts)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Delhi State AYUSH Society (DSAS), Directorate of AYUSH, Govt. of NCT of Delhi Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Program Manager, Consultant NAM, Medical Officer (Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy), Yoga Instructor, and Pharmacist posts! Published on 09.05.2026 at DSAS Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 167 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 27 to 60 years (depending on post and category) and possessing relevant qualifications such as BAMS/BUMS/BHMS, Degree in Yoga, Graduate/MBA in Healthcare/HR/Health Admin, or Diploma in AYUSH strea

important_dates.interview_date: To be uploaded on https://ayush.delhi.gov.in/ in due course
important_dates.admit_card_date: No separate call letter will be issued; schedule to be checked on official website

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on the last date of registration, i.e. 25-05-2026. Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC and Physically Handicapped candidates will be given as per Government of India guidelines, subject to submission of Caste/Disability Certificate issued by the Appropriate Authority. OBC Certificate with Non-Creamy Layer and EWS Certificate issued by appropriate authority of Govt. of NCT of Delhi only will be accepted for the Current Financial Year.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online registration (25-05-2026). Registration with Delhi Bhartiya Chikitsa Parishad / Board of Homoeopathic System Delhi is mandatory for BAMS/BUMS/BHMS doctors. Preference is given to candidates with experience in the Health/AYUSH sector and proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint). Educational qualifications must be from a recognized university/institution. | Post-wise Essential Qualification and Remuneration

selection_process: Probation Period Initial assessment (probation) period of 3 months from the date of first engagement

Selection will be made on the basis of Document Verification and Interview. Only candidates who have registered online will be allowed to appear in the Interview. No separate call letter will be issued. The detailed schedule for Interview and Document Verification will be uploaded on the official website https://ayush.delhi.gov.in/ in due course. The decision of the Chairman
Delhi State AYUSH Society regarding selection of candidates will be final.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official DSAS/AYUSH Delhi portal at https://ayush.delhi.gov.in/. Online registration is mandatory — unregistered candidates will not be allowed to appear in the Interview. The online registration portal is active from 09-05-2026 to 25-05-2026. All updates related to the recruitment process will be provided through the official website only. No TA/DA shall be paid for attending the Interview.
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Document Verification & Interview:
Matriculation / 10th Certificate in support of date of birth
Marks Sheets, Degree & Certificates of Essential Educational Qualifications
Marks Sheets, Degree & Certificates of Desirable Qualifications (if any)
Experience Certificates (current working experience certificates also)
Valid Income and Assets Certificate (for EWS Category)
Candidates must bring all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies at the time of Interview.
important_instructions: Online Registration is mandatory; unregistered candidates will not be allowed to appear in the Interview. All positions are purely on a contractual basis as per the policy of National Ayush Mission; the contract may be extended or terminated without assigning any reason. The cut-off date for age, qualification, and experience will be the last date of registration, i.e. 25-05-2026. Registration with Delhi Bhartiya Chikitsa Parishad / Board of Homoeopathic System Delhi is mandatory for BAMS/BUMS/BHMS doctors. OBC Certificate with Non-Creamy Layer and EWS Certificate issued by appropriate authority of Govt. of NCT of Delhi only will be accepted for the Current Financial Year. No TA/DA shall be paid for attending the Interview. No separate call letter will be issued; candidates must check the official website for Interview schedule. Delhi State AYUSH Society reserves the right to increase/decrease/cancel vacancies or withdraw recruitment process without prior notice. Candidates should not have been convicted by any court of law. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. In case of any dispute, legal jurisdiction will be Delhi only. All information/details of the recruitment process and results will be provided through https://ayush.delhi.gov.in/ only.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in DSAS NAM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Delhi State AYUSH Society has announced 167 vacancies for Program Manager, Consultant NAM, Medical Officer (Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy), Yoga Instructor and Pharmacist posts under the National AYUSH Mission on a contractual basis for 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for DSAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration starts on 09 May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 25 May 2026, and only applications submitted through the official AYUSH Delhi website will be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are available under Delhi State AYUSH Society Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification covers Program Manager, Consultant NAM, Medical Officer (Ayurveda, Unani, Homoeopathy), Yoga Instructor and Pharmacist (Ayurveda, Unani, Homoeopathy), including hiring against regular sanctioned vacant posts on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for DSAS NAM 2026 posts?
faq.answer: Monthly consolidated remuneration ranges from ₹20,000 for Pharmacist, ₹28,000 for Yoga Instructor, ₹40,000 for Medical Officer to ₹55,000 for Consultant NAM and ₹65,000 for Program Manager, with part of the pay being performance‑linked for some posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for DSAS NAM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As on 25 May 2026, the upper age limit is up to 60 years for Program Manager and Consultant NAM, not exceeding 35 years for Medical Officer, 30 years for Yoga Instructor, and 27 years for Pharmacist, with relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/PwD as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications for DSAS Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: For Medical Officer (Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy), candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree (BAMS/BUMS/BHMS) in the respective system from a recognized university and must be enrolled in the Delhi State Register of Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy.

faq.question: Q7. What is the eligibility for Yoga Instructor in DSAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yoga Instructor candidates must have either a Degree in Yoga (minimum 55%) from a UGC‑recognized university or any graduation with a one‑year Yoga Diploma (minimum 55%), along with Level‑III Yoga Certification Board qualification and at least one year practical experience in Yoga.

faq.question: Q8. What is the qualification for Pharmacist under DSAS NAM 2026?
faq.answer: For Pharmacist (Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy), the essential qualification is Intermediate (10+2) plus a minimum 2‑year Diploma in Ayurveda/Unani/Homoeopathy/AYUSH from a government or government‑recognized institution in the respective stream.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for DSAS NAM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be done through Document Verification followed by Interview/Personality Test, and only candidates who have completed online registration will be allowed to appear; no separate call letters are issued, and the schedule will be notified on the official website.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for Delhi State AYUSH Society DSAS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online at ayush.delhi.gov.in between 09 May 2026 and 25 May 2026, fill the registration form, upload the required documents, and then appear for document verification and interview as per the schedule announced on the website.
